title: ambrosia johnstoniorum
intro: Ambrosia johnstoniorum, also known as Johnston's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Ambrosia johnstoniorum include teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as salves and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
